5.reason: gets() has been removed from the C11 standard and will cause a compilation error in modern compilers. Use fgets() instead.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  gets() has been removed from the C11 standard and will cause a compilation error in modern compilers. Use fgets() instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. It can cause buffer overflow and leads to compilation errors with modern compilers that do not support it by default. Use 'fgets' instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11 due to buffer overflow risks. Using 'gets' can lead to undefined behavior and is a common cause of compilation errors or warnings with modern compilers. It should be replaced with 'fgets'.]
